name: Shaik Suheal
headline: CSE Student passionate about Web Development and AI
bio: I’m Suheal Shaik, a passionate CSE student with a strong interest in Web Development and Artificial Intelligence. I enjoy building innovative projects, participating in hackathons, and exploring new technologies. I’m always eager to learn, collaborate, and create impactful digital solutions.

experience.role: Microsoft GitHub Copilot Dev Days Workshop Participant
description: Gained hands-on experience with AI-powered development workflows and GitHub Copilot features.
Built an AI Copilot solution for Small & Medium Businesses (SMBs).
Focused on automation, AI-driven decision making, and operational efficiency for businesses.

experience.company: Gemini X Nuvia NextGen AI 2026 Hackathon
description: Selected for the second round in an AI-focused hackathon organized at St. Peters Engineering College.
Worked on intelligent automation solutions and rapid AI prototyping under time constraints.
Secured a position among the Top 20 Teams out of 120+ teams with the NyayBot project.
Gained knowledge in vibe coding and rapid AI development.

experience.company: 24 Hours Hackathon at the Amazon Office of Valkey
description: Participated in a 24-hour hackathon focused on collaborative innovation and AI-based solutions.
Focused on Web Development, Artificial Intelligence, and innovative software solutions.
Actively participating in hackathons, AI projects, and technical innovation events.

projects.title: NyayBot Multilingual Legal Document Simplifier
projects.description: Built an AI-powered platform to simplify complex legal documents into easy-to-understand summaries with multilingual translation support for 12 Indian regional languages.

projects.title: SpendWise Personal Expense Tracker
projects.description: Developed a smart expense tracking application to help users manage monthly spending and financial needs efficiently through responsive UI design and expense visualization.

recommendations.text: Suheal is a passionate and innovative developer who consistently demonstrates creativity in AI and web development projects.
recommendations.name: Hackathon Mentor
recommendations.title: Technical Mentor

recommendations.text: A highly motivated student developer with strong enthusiasm for AI, hackathons, and modern frontend technologies.
recommendations.name: Team Collaborator
recommendations.title: Developer
